description: Ballpark is a research platform for creating and running surveys, usability tests, prototype tests, video feedback, and related studies. It serves product, marketing, consumer, and brand research teams and also offers AI-assisted workflows.
summary: Ballpark exposes a GraphQL API authenticated by personal access tokens or OAuth 2.0, plus a streamable-HTTP MCP server at `https://edge.ballparkhq.com/api/mcp` that supports unauthenticated drafting/preview and OAuth for publishing to a workspace.
